dialogos.texto_en: Was there really that kind of exhibit?\nI didn't notice it.
There was, I definitely saw it.
What was it?
Ah, Fu-kun.\nYou know the corridor we entered from,\nwith the glass floor?
Ah, yeah, the one with the ocean paintings on both walls.\nYeah, I remember.
Itsuki said there were living sea creatures\nunder the glass floor. Did you notice?
Oh? Really? I didn't notice.
Oh, my. What a shame we have this opportunity\nto visit the museum.\nBoth of you need to concentrate more on observing your surroundings.
It's hard to notice the things beneath you.\nIt's not often you look at the floor, after all.
By the way, what kind of sea creatures were there?
The coral spread on the seabed and the fish\nthat gather around the coral\nwere made into a diorama. It was really beautiful.
Hmm, I'll have to check it out later.
By the way, did you both know?\nCoral is often mistaken for a plant,\nbut it's actually an animal.
Coral?\nIt definitely doesn't look like a plant to me.
It's called a cnidarian,\nrelated to jellyfish and anemones.
Really? Even I knew that.\nCoral spawning is even on the news.
The way the small eggs spread throughout the ocean,\nit was like a miracle of life itself.
Oh, I've seen that too.
Indeed, if it lays eggs, it's not a plant.\nI was completely fooled by its appearance.
Despite how it looks,\nit has a mouth and even bones.\nIt's a magnificent animal.
...Ah%p-2;――%p; by the way?\nHave you two seen Miku?
Ah, so that was your plan, to ask about Miku all along.
I haven't seen her.
I haven't either.\nI don't think she came this way.
I see.
Hey, about her, do you guys notice anything\nthat might be causing her to act strange?
I mean...\nIt could be anything you've noticed,\npossibly a reason?
Listen, okay?\nIt's probably just you,\nI mean, who else could it be but you, right?
I'm telling you, I have no idea.\nI already told you earlier.
That's hard to believe, don't you think?
Yes, I agree.
What's up with you two?
It's because you sometimes say things unconsciously\nthat lack delicacy.
Well, in a way, that's also\npart of Fu-kun's charm, you know.
...I'm not sure I agree with that.
In other words, you were so preoccupied with Miku,\nthat you missed the exhibit on the ground, hm?
Th-that's not the case...
Teehee, Miku is really lucky, isn't she?\nTo be thought of so much by you, Fu-kun.
Ooh...
I understand that you're\nmaking an effort in your own way.\nI'm not saying that it's not enough.
There's gotta be something else.
For example, what, then?
She could be worried about the future.\nIf that's the case,\nI'll listen to her, and give her advice.
If it's that kind of worry,\nI think she would've at least talked to Nino about it.\nSince, they're on the same path.
Well, maybe there are things that are hard to talk about\nbetween close sisters.
...Teehee.
What the hell.
Fu-kun, even though you're not our tutor anymore,\nyou still have a knack for playing teacher, huh?
Don't make fun of me...
In other words, you were so preoccupied with Miku,\nthat you missed the exhibit on the ground, hm?
Th-that's not the case...
Teehee, Miku is really lucky, isn't she?\nTo be thought of so much by you, Fu-kun.
Ooh...
I understand that you're\nmaking an effort in your own way.\nI'm not saying that it's not enough.
Well, that might be the case...
Oh, I see you're aware of it.\nThat's good to hear.
Yes, it's surprising\nthat you're so quick to admitting you're wrong.
Surprising? What do you mean?
Well, it means that you have more influence over Miku\nthan we do.
Wha%p-2;――%p;?!\nIs that...so?
Ah, you still haven't realized that yet.
If that's the case,\nthen what you said earlier was just a boast, right?
No, that wasn't my intention, you know?!
Keep your voice down in the museum.
Y-Yes I know...
In other words, you were so preoccupied with Miku,\nthat you missed the exhibit on the ground, hm?
Th-that's not the case...
Teehee, Miku is really lucky, isn't she?\nTo be thought of so much by you, Fu-kun.
Ooh...
I understand that you're\nmaking an effort in your own way.\nI'm not saying that it's not enough.
Even then, your efforts might not be enough, love is quite complex.
Please give Miku all of your attention, okay?
I will.
